messages.author: Alex Nguyen (Support)
messages.text: Random personal question - does anyone know if unused PTO rolls over into next year? Just trying to plan a trip for myself.

thread_replies.author: Leah Fischer (People)
thread_replies.text: I believe it does up to a cap, but check with People team directly for your specific balance.

messages.author: Trevor James (Ops)
messages.text: Anyone want to grab the extra bagels in the Ops kitchen before they go stale? First come first serve.
